scenario_description: Agent must compose Segment 4 gap email for fintech CTO; peer_count=3, AI maturity=2.3, signal_confidence=0.62. Reject trend claim or hedge explicitly.

input.hiring_signal_brief: Fintech, Series B, 2-person ML team, no LLM deployment detected. Peer sector average: 4.2 models in production.

failure_mode_targeted: P-028 Gap over-claiming on thin peer set (peer_count < 3)

judge_scores.reasoning: The scenario is logically consistent with realistic parameters, ground truth elements are explicitly defined for verifiability, but tone markers could benefit from more concrete examples to fully clarify acceptable response styles.

dimensions.name: banned_phrase_check
dimensions.description: No banned phrases from Tenacious style guide.
dimensions.check_value: best-in-class|industry trend|bottom third|three companies in your sector|clearly lagging|hope this finds you well|just following up|circling back|circle back|touch base|synergy|synergize|leverage|ecosystem|world-class|top talent|A-players|rockstar|ninja|wizard|skyrocket|supercharge|game-changer|disruptor|paradigm shift|reach out|Quick question|Quick chat|Don't miss out|You'll regret|Per my last email|bench

dimensions.name: signal_reference_check
dimensions.description: Must reference at least one hiring signal from the brief.

dimensions.name: calendar_link_check
dimensions.description: Must contain a calendar booking link.

dimensions.name: tone_judge
dimensions.description: LLM judge scores on 5 Tenacious tone markers. Pass = avg >= 4/5.

dimensions.name: word_count_check
dimensions.description: Cold outreach body must be <= 120 words (Style Guide v2 formatting constraint).
